Since no rotation achieves simple symmetry (top==bottom, left==right, etc.), maybe the goal is something else.

Yes, the yellow blocks stayed in the same positions. They're fixed markers.

Actually, let me look at the ring structure more carefully. The ring isn't a continuous loop of blocks - there are gaps between some blocks. Let me identify the gap positions.

Row 19: cccccccccccggggccSSSSccbbbbccppppccYYYYccggggccppppccc
The pattern is: gggg cc SSSS cc bbbb cc pppp cc YYYY cc gggg cc pppp
So there are 2-cell charcoal gaps between each pair of blocks in the top row.

Left side: wwww at cols 12-15, then lots of charcoal until bbbb at cols 48-51
